revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-395

A joint used in masonry or joinery for connecting two members together, one member having fan shaped tenons projecting from it which fit into a similar shaped rebate in the other member.

{{IALAFooter}}
